title: Public Speaker - Technology and STEM Events
summary: Regular public speaker at technology and STEM events. Spoken at iHub, Parklands, and industry events on topics spanning software engineering, robotics mentorship, and youth development in technology.
details: Delivered talks at iHub, one of Africa's leading innovation hubs, on technology and engineering topics.
Public speaking at Parklands covering STEM education and mentorship experiences.
Speaks on the intersection of software engineering, international robotics competition, and building access to STEM for underserved communities.
